name: repository-excellence-suite
description: End-to-end repository quality pipeline: audit, refactor, document, and review — all from one command.
author: Kazi

repository-auditor.description: Complete read-only codebase investigation producing 9 structured reports and a scorecard. Use for 'audit this repo', 'code review', 'health check'.

repository-surgeon.description: Safe, evidence-based refactoring from audit findings. Use for 'clean up', 'refactor', 'fix code quality'.

documentation-architect.description: Produces comprehensive, accurate documentation grounded in post-refactor code. Use for 'write docs', 'create README', 'document this'.

repository-guardian.description: Final independent Staff Engineer-style review of pipeline output. Use for 'verify', 'final review', 'sanity check'.

repository-orchestrator.description: Single entry point that coordinates all four stages. Use for 'run the full pipeline', 'make this production-ready'.
